entry.title: cally.com
entry.description: Cally.com offers free online scheduling for meetings and events with simple poll-based coordination.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows unlimited event scheduling with basic poll features.
caveats: Some features like calendar sync and branding require paid plans.

quickstartSteps: Go to https://cally.com/ and sign up for a free account.
Create a new event and enter meeting details.
Add possible dates and times for participants to choose from.
Share the poll link with attendees.
Review responses and confirm the final meeting time.
entry.whenToUse: Use Cally.com when you need a simple, free tool to coordinate meeting times with groups via polls.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require calendar integrations, advanced reminders, or branded scheduling pages.
entry.body: Cally.com provides a straightforward, free solution for scheduling meetings and events using poll-based coordination, ideal for small groups and informal teams.

entry.title: Chanty
entry.description: Chanty is a team chat and collaboration platform offering messaging, file sharing, and task management for small teams.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan for up to 10 members with unlimited public and private conversations.
caveats: Some features like screen sharing and unlimited integrations require paid plan

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Chanty account at chanty.com.
Create a new team and invite up to 10 members.
Set up channels for different topics or projects.
Start messaging, sharing files, and assigning tasks.
Explore available integrations for enhanced workflow.
entry.whenToUse: Use Chanty when you need a simple, free team chat and collaboration tool for up to 10 users.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced integrations, video conferencing, or support for larger teams.
entry.body: Chanty provides a free, easy-to-use team chat platform with task management and file sharing, best suited for small teams and simple collaboration needs.

entry.title: HeySpace
entry.description: HeySpace is a team collaboration platform combining chat, task management, and project organization in one workspace.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan for up to 5 users with core chat and task features.

quickstartSteps: Sign up at hey.space with your email.
Create a new workspace for your team or project.
Invite up to 4 additional team members.
Start a chat or create tasks using the Kanban board.
Organize tasks into lists and assign them to team members.
entry.whenToUse: Use HeySpace when you need a simple, integrated chat and task management tool for small teams or projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid HeySpace if you require advanced integrations, large storage, or support for more than 5 users on the free plan.
entry.body: HeySpace offers a free plan for up to 5 users, combining chat and task management for small teams or projects. The platform is easy to set up and use, making it suitable for students, startups, and agencies needing basic collaboration tools. Storage and integration limits apply, so larger teams or those needing advanced features should consider alternatives.

entry.title: Huly
entry.description: Huly offers free static site hosting with custom domains, SSL, and GitHub integration.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free static site hosting with unlimited bandwidth and custom domains.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Huly account.
Connect your GitHub repository containing your static site.
Configure your custom domain (optional).
Deploy your site with one click.
Verify deployment and SSL status.
entry.whenToUse: Use Huly to quickly host static sites with custom domains and SSL, especially for personal, demo, or open source projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Huly if you need server-side logic, databases, or advanced backend features, as only static content is supported.
entry.body: Huly provides free, easy-to-use static site hosting with custom domains, SSL, and GitHub integration, ideal for personal and open source projects.

entry.title: Miro
entry.description: Miro is an online collaborative whiteboard platform for brainstorming, diagramming, and visual project management.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes unlimited team members and 3 editable boards.
caveats: No private boards on free plan

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Miro account at miro.com.
Create a new team or join an existing one.
Start a new board using a template or blank canvas.
Invite collaborators via email or shareable link.
Use drawing, sticky notes, and shapes to visualize ideas.
entry.whenToUse: Use Miro for collaborative brainstorming, diagramming, or visual planning with remote or distributed teams.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need unlimited boards, advanced export, or private boards without upgrading to a paid plan.
entry.body: Miro offers a free plan for collaborative whiteboarding, suitable for small teams or individuals needing up to three editable boards with basic features.

entry.title: Pumble
entry.description: Pumble is a free team chat and collaboration platform for messaging, file sharing, and organizing conversations.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited users and message history with core chat features for free.

quickstartSteps: Go to https://pumble.com and click 'Sign Up'.
Create your workspace by entering your team or project name.
Invite team members via email or share the invite link.
Set up channels for different topics or projects.
Start messaging, sharing files, and collaborating in real time.
entry.whenToUse: Use Pumble when you need a free, simple team chat tool with unlimited users and message history.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced integrations, enterprise compliance, or more than 10GB storage per workspace.
entry.body: Pumble offers unlimited users and message history for free, making it a practical choice for teams seeking a no-cost chat and collaboration solution with basic features.

entry.title: Talky.io
entry.description: Talky.io offers free, browser-based video calls with no registration required for small groups.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free video calls for up to 6 participants per room.
caveats: No advanced moderation or admin controls

quickstartSteps: Go to https://talky.io/ in your browser.
Enter a unique room name and click 'Start a chat'.
Share the room link with up to 5 others.
Allow browser access to your camera and microphone.
Begin your video call instantly.
entry.whenToUse: Use Talky.io for instant, no-signup video calls with small groups when you need a simple, privacy-friendly solution.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need large meetings, call recording, scheduling, or enterprise security features.
entry.body: Talky.io is a free, browser-based video conferencing tool for small groups, requiring no registration or installation.

entry.title: Teamcamp
entry.description: Teamcamp offers free project management tools for small teams, including task boards, time tracking, and collaboration features.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan for up to 3 users with unlimited projects and tasks.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Teamcamp account at https://www.teamcamp.app.
Create your first workspace and invite up to 2 teammates.
Set up a project and add tasks to your board.
Assign tasks and set deadlines for your team.
Use time tracking and comments to collaborate on tasks.
entry.whenToUse: Use Teamcamp when you need a simple, free project management tool for a small team or side project.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced features, large team support, or integrations beyond the basics.
entry.body: Teamcamp provides a free, user-friendly project management platform ideal for small teams needing basic task organization, collaboration, and time tracking.

entry.title: Teamhood
entry.description: Teamhood is a collaborative project management tool with Kanban boards, Gantt charts, and time tracking features.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan for up to 5 users with core project management features.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Teamhood account.
Create a new workspace for your team or project.
Set up your first Kanban board and add tasks.
Invite up to 4 additional team members.
Explore Gantt chart and time tracking features.
entry.whenToUse: Use Teamhood when you need a visual, collaborative tool for managing tasks and timelines with a small team.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced reporting, large team support, or deep integrations without upgrading to a paid plan.
entry.body: Teamhood offers a free plan for small teams to manage projects visually with Kanban boards, Gantt charts, and basic collaboration tools.

entry.title: Teamplify
entry.description: Teamplify offers team productivity analytics, time tracking, and project visibility for distributed and remote teams.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan for up to 5 users with core analytics and integrations.
caveats: Some integrations and advanced features require paid plans

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Teamplify account.
Invite up to 5 team members.
Connect your project management tools (e.g., Jira, GitHub, Trello).
Configure team settings and working hours.
Review analytics and reports from the dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Teamplify to gain insights into team productivity and workload, especially for distributed or remote teams needing integrated analytics.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced analytics, unlimited users, or deep integrations without upgrading to a paid plan.
avoidIf: teams over 5 users on free tier
entry.body: Teamplify provides productivity analytics and time tracking for small teams, with a free plan supporting up to 5 users and basic integrations.

entry.title: Terrateam
entry.description: Terrateam is a GitHub-integrated Terraform automation platform for collaborative infrastructure management and policy enforcement.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier for public repositories and small teams with limited usage.
caveats: Private repo support limited to 2 repos

useCases: Enforcing infrastructure policies in code reviews
quickstartSteps: Sign up at terrateam.io with your GitHub account.
Install the Terrateam GitHub App to your repositories.
Configure repository settings and Terraform workflows.
Commit Terraform code and open a pull request to trigger automation.
Review and approve infrastructure changes via GitHub.
entry.whenToUse: Use Terrateam if you need automated Terraform workflows and policy enforcement tightly integrated with GitHub pull requests.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require support for more than 2 private repositories or need advanced features without a paid plan.
entry.body: Terrateam automates Terraform workflows and policy enforcement for GitHub repositories, making infrastructure-as-code collaboration easier for small teams and open source projects.

entry.title: Zoho Meeting
entry.description: Zoho Meeting is a browser-based platform for online meetings and webinars with screen sharing and recording features.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan allows unlimited one-on-one meetings and group meetings up to 60 minutes for 100 participants.
caveats: Recording and some advanced features require paid plans
Webinar hosting not included in free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Zoho account at zoho.com/meeting.
Verify your email and log in to the Zoho Meeting dashboard.
Click 'Host Meeting' to schedule or start an instant meeting.
Share the meeting link with participants.
Use in-browser controls to manage participants and share your screen.
entry.whenToUse: Use Zoho Meeting for quick, browser-based video meetings or small group calls without installing extra software.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need long-duration meetings, webinar hosting, or advanced integrations without upgrading to a paid plan.
entry.body: Zoho Meeting offers a simple, browser-based solution for online meetings and small group video calls, with a free plan suitable for basic collaboration needs.
